shot_notes: The request for brains and Oz
evidence_summary: Establish the traveling partnership between dorothy and the_scarecrow through a physical rescue and shared destination. The interaction must transition from the isolation of the cornfield to the movement along the yellow_brick_road.

Dorothy helps the Scarecrow down from his pole. The Scarecrow explains his desire for brains and asks Dorothy to take him to the Emerald City to see Oz. Dorothy agrees, and they set off together, with a skeptical Toto following.
From confusion to companionship and shared purpose.
the_scarecrow is suspended on a pole at the edge of the cornfield.
dorothy and the_scarecrow walk away down the road with toto following.
Helping the scarecrow down, negotiating a journey to the Emerald City, and departing.
